Class FunctionalBlockContractPO

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractPO
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.FunctionalBlockContractPO
All Implemented Interfaces:
ContractPO, IPersistablePO, ProofOblInput
Direct Known Subclasses:
WdFunctionalBlockContractPO
public class FunctionalBlockContractPO extends AbstractPO implements ContractPO
A proof obligation for a FunctionalBlockContract.

  • Constructor Details

    • FunctionalBlockContractPO

      public FunctionalBlockContractPO(InitConfig initConfig, FunctionalBlockContract contract)
      Parameters:
      initConfig - the initial proof configuration.
      contract - the contract from which this PO is generated.

  • Method Details

    • createLocalAnonUpdate

      protected static JTerm createLocalAnonUpdate(ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOutVariables, Services services, TermBuilder tb)
      Parameters:
      localOutVariables - a set of variables.
      services - services.
      tb - the TermBuilder to be used
      Returns:
      an anonymizing update for the specified variables.

    • setUpValidityTerm

      protected JTerm setUpValidityTerm(List<LocationVariable> heaps, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonHeaps, Map<LocationVariable, Function> anonOutHeaps, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localInVariables, ImmutableSet<LocationVariable> localOutVariables, ProgramVariable exceptionParameter, JTerm[] assumptions, JTerm[] postconditions, JTerm[] updates, BlockContract bc, AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder conditionsAndClausesBuilder, AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator configurator, Services services, TermBuilder tb)
      Parameters:
      heaps - the heaps.
      anonHeaps - the heaps used in the anonIn update.
      anonOutHeaps - the heaps used in the anonOut update.
      localInVariables - the free local variables in the block.
      localOutVariables - the free local variables modifiable by the block.
      exceptionParameter - the exception variable.
      assumptions - the preconditions.
      postconditions - the postconditions.
      updates - the update.
      bc - the contract being applied.
      conditionsAndClausesBuilder - a conditions and clauses builder.
      configurator - a goal configurator.
      services - services.
      tb - a term builder.
      Returns:
      the validity formula for the contract.

    • createLoaderConfig

      public Configuration createLoaderConfig()
      Description copied from class: AbstractPO
      This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
      Specified by:
      createLoaderConfig in interface IPersistablePO
      Overrides:
      createLoaderConfig in class AbstractPO
      Returns:

    • implies

      Description copied from interface: ProofOblInput

      Overrides:
